member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Core.IPlatformContext
member.summary: Provides access to platform services available to modules.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Core.IPlatformContext.Modules
member.summary: Gets the read-only catalog of loaded modules.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Core.Kernel
member.summary: Represents the Masterdom platform kernel.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Core.Kernel.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Core.Kernel.State
member.summary: Gets the current kernel state.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Core.Kernel.Context
member.summary: Gets the platform context.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Core.Kernel.LoadModule(Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule)
member.summary: Loads a module into the platform.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Core.Kernel.Start
member.summary: Starts the platform kernel.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Core.Kernel.Stop
member.summary: Stops the platform kernel.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Core.KernelState
member.summary: Represents the lifecycle state of the platform kernel.

member.name: F:Masterdom.Platform.Core.KernelState.Created
member.summary: The kernel has been created but has not started. Modules may still be loaded.

member.name: F:Masterdom.Platform.Core.KernelState.Starting
member.summary: The kernel is starting. Modules are being registered and initialized.

member.name: F:Masterdom.Platform.Core.KernelState.Running
member.summary: The kernel is fully started and running.

member.name: F:Masterdom.Platform.Core.KernelState.Faulted
member.summary: The kernel encountered an unrecoverable error during startup or execution and is no longer in a valid operational state.

member.name: F:Masterdom.Platform.Core.KernelState.Stopping
member.summary: The kernel is shutting down.

member.name: F:Masterdom.Platform.Core.KernelState.Stopped
member.summary: The kernel has been shut down.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Core.PlatformContext
member.summary: Represents the platform context that is shared with modules.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Core.PlatformContext.#ctor(Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleCatalog)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Core.PlatformVersion
member.summary: Represents the current version of the Masterdom platform.

member.name: F:Masterdom.Platform.Core.PlatformVersion.Current
member.summary: Current platform version.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.ConsoleDiagnostics
member.summary: Writes diagnostics to the console.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.DiagnosticEntry
member.summary: Represents a single diagnostic event.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.DiagnosticEntry.TimestampUtc
member.summary: Gets the UTC timestamp.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.DiagnosticEntry.Severity
member.summary: Gets the severity.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.DiagnosticEntry.Source
member.summary: Gets the component generating the event.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.DiagnosticEntry.Message
member.summary: Gets the message.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.DiagnosticEntry.Exception
member.summary: Gets the associated exception.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.DiagnosticSeverity
member.summary: Represents the severity of a diagnostic entry.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Diagnostics.IDiagnostics
member.summary: Writes diagnostic events.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule
member.summary: Defines the contract for a platform module.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule.Metadata
member.summary: Gets the module metadata.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule.Initialize(Masterdom.Platform.Core.IPlatformContext)
member.summary: Initializes the module.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule.Shutdown(Masterdom.Platform.Core.IPlatformContext)
member.summary: Shuts down the module.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleCatalog
member.summary: Represents a read-only catalog of platform modules.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleCatalog.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of registered modules.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleCatalog.Contains(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a module exists.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleCatalog.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a module by identifier.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleCatalog.TryGet(System.String,Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a module.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleLoader
member.summary: Defines the contract for loading modules into the platform.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleLoader.Load(Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule,Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleRegistry)
member.summary: Loads a module into the specified registry.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleMetadata
member.summary: Represents the immutable metadata that describes a platform module.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleMetadata.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique, stable identifier of the module.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleMetadata.Name
member.summary: Gets the technical name of the module.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleMetadata.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets the user-friendly display name of the module.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleMetadata.Version
member.summary: Gets the module version.

member.name: P:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleMetadata.Description
member.summary: Gets the module description.

member.name: T:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleRegistry
member.summary: Represents the writable platform module registry.

member.name: M:Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModuleRegistry.Register(Masterdom.Platform.Modules.IModule)
member.summary: Registers a module.

member.summary: Provides a base implementation of .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Represents the metadata describing a platform module.

member.summary: Gets the unique, stable identifier of the module.

member.summary: Gets the technical name of the module.

member.summary: Gets the user-friendly display name of the module.

member.summary: Gets the module version.

member.summary: Gets the module description.

member.summary: Default implementation of .

member.summary: Stores platform modules.

member.summary: Represents the base class for built-in platform modules.
